mnemonics.title: Remembering Classical Problems
mnemonics.content: PCRD - Producer-Consumer, Readers-Writers, Dining Philosophers. Like PCR DNA test for synchronization problems.

mnemonics.title: Producer-Consumer Semaphores
mnemonics.content: MFE - Mutex, Full, Empty - the three essential semaphores for Producer-Consumer solution.

mnemonics.title: Dining Philosophers Solutions
mnemonics.content: LARA - Limit philosophers, Asymmetric picking, Resource hierarchy, Atomic pickup - strategies to avoid deadlock.
